triples.subject: EVs
triples.object: 23% of all new car sales worldwide by 2025
triples.sentence: According to a report by BloombergNEF, EVs are expected to account for 23% of all new car sales worldwide by 2025.

triples.subject: EV owners in Singapore
triples.object: availability of charging stations (44%), brand reputation (41%), and environmental impact (41%)
triples.sentence: Meanwhile, EV owners in Singapore have different motivators, citing the availability of charging stations (44%), brand reputation (41%), and environmental impact (41%) as their top reasons.

triples.subject: 52% of prospective buyers in Singapore
triples.object: the price of an EV model and the potential cost savings on fuel and maintenance
triples.sentence: Meanwhile, in Singapore, 52% of prospective buyers take into account the price of an EV model and the potential cost savings on fuel and maintenance.

triples.subject: 49% of potential buyers in the US
triples.sentence: In contrast, potential buyers in the US are most concerned about the availability of charging stations (49%).

triples.subject: 35% in Singapore
triples.sentence: In fact, 35% in Singapore and 33% in the UK prefer a hybrid car over an EV for their next purchase.
